entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (3) awarded to EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION". THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT GUIDANCE FOR THE SERVICERS ON LOGO USE AND BRANDING.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (4) awarded to EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0004 TO CONTRACT #ED-FSA-12-D-0005 IS TO REPLACE SECTION B.11 FSA 32-1 INVOICE PROCEDURES (NOVEMBER 2009) WITH FSA 32-1 INVOICE CLAUSE (MAR 2012). SEE ENCLOSURE 1 FOR THE FULL TEXT OF THE REVISED CLAUSE.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION." - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE NEW CLAUSES, CORRECT AN ERROR IN THE PRICING TABLE, AND TO APPOINT AN ALTERNATE CONTRACTING OFFICER'S REPRESENTATIVE (COR).

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (9) awarded to EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: "CRITICAL FUNCTION" - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD NORTH TEXAS HIGHER EDUCATION AUTHORITY AS A SUBCONTRACTOR OF EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC. VIA CONTRACT # ED-FSA-12-D-0005.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00001) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICING CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXECUTE THE NOVATION AGREEMENT BETWEEN EDUCATIONAL SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC (ESA) AND HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICING CORPORATION (HESC).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00002) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICING CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE CLIN STRUCTURE TO CONFORM WITH THE NEW CONTRACT WRITING SYSTEM, AND TO ADD CLAUSE 52.204-15, SERVICE CONTRACT REPORTING REQUIREMENTS FOR INDEFINITE-DELIVERY CONTRACTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE KEY SUBCONTRACTOR LIST FOR HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICES CORPORATION.
